content.title: Variable Expansion & Validation
content.tooltip: Auto-expands variables and calc functions while validating and fixing broken values.

content.title: Contextual Menus
content.tooltip: Adds context menus for inserting classes and variables.

content.title: Style Preview & Keyboard Enhancements
content.tooltip: Hit Tab to select and preview a class or hover over a class for live preview. While tabbed, you can start typing to instantly add/remove characters to the selected class name.

content.title: Hide Deactivated Classes
content.tooltip: Hides all deactivated classes from the builder dropdowns and auto-suggest.

content.title: Auto-BEM
content.tooltip: Allows you to generate BEM classes for a Block automatically in seconds.

content.title: Color Scheme Switcher (Builder)
content.tooltip: Adds a color scheme toggle to the top of the page. Click it to toggle between light and dark mode.

content.title: Auto Object Fit
content.tooltip: Automatically adds object-fit cover to your images to avoid warping.

content.title: Stack the 'Add Elements' Panel
content.tooltip: Display elements in a more efficient single-column layout.

content.title: Pro Mode for 'Add Elements'
content.tooltip: Remove the useless, pre-made, walled-garden beginner elements.

content.title: Hide Redundant Bricks Components
content.tooltip: Hide the native components that Frames components replace.

content.title: Use Bricks UI for Buttons
content.tooltip: Makes the Bricks button styles UI compatible with ACSS.

content.title: Enhance Transparent Color Swatches
content.tooltip: Adds a checkerboard background to the Bricks color swatches to better distinguish transparent colors.

content.title: Bricks Grid Visualizer
content.tooltip: Should the Bricks grid visualization overlay be on or off (off is recommended)?

content.title: Import Original Classes for Templates
content.tooltip: When you import a remote template and rename the classes, bricks imports the same template with the renamed classes instead of fresh ones - this feature prevents this and gives you the original classes of the remote templates.

content.title: Improve CSS Editing
content.tooltip: Improve the CSS editing experience in Bricks.

content.title: CSS First Styling in Bricks
content.tooltip: Move the CSS panel to the top of Style tab.

content.title: Remove Deactivated Classes
content.tooltip: Remove deactivated classes from the Bricks database when saving ACSS settings.

content.text: Enable or disable classes based on the features you need. Disabled classes get removed from the stylesheet.

content.title: Accessibility Classes
content.tooltip: Load accessibility classes (hidden-accessible, skip-link, etc.).

content.title: Contextual Colors
content.tooltip: Load contextual color classes.

content.title: Gaps (Contextual)
content.tooltip: Classes to set contextual gaps.

content.title: Is Background (.is-bg)
content.tooltip: Utility class to set anything as a background layer.

content.title: Section Padding
content.tooltip: Classes to change section block padding.

content.title: Sticky Classes
content.tooltip: Classes to make elements sticky.

content.title: Text Size Classes
content.tooltip: Classes to change text and heading sizes.

content.title: Transition Classes
content.tooltip: Classes to set transition.

content.title: Width
content.tooltip: Classes to set max-width on elements.

content.text: Caution: Disabling variables will break associated utility classes and features. Only disable if you're not using the associated feature entirely.

content.title: Auto Grid Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for auto grids.

content.title: Black and White Color Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for black and white (required for color scheme support).

content.title: Border Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for border styles (also used in cards).

content.title: Box Shadow Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for box shadows.

content.title: Text Shadow Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for text shadows.

content.title: Drop Shadow Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for drop shadows (filter: drop-shadow).

content.title: Column Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for CSS columns.

content.title: Contextual Color Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for contextual colors (bg-light, text-light, etc.).

content.title: Contextual Space Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for contextual spacing (container gap, content gap, etc.).

content.title: Divider Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for divider styles.

content.title: Grid Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for grids.

content.title: Header Height Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for header height (also used for content offset, sticky offset, etc.).

content.title: Heading Size Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for heading sizes.

content.title: Link Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for link styles.

content.title: Radius Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for border radius.

content.title: Section Space Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for section spacing.

content.title: Space Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for spacing.

content.title: Sticky Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for position: sticky;

content.title: Text Size Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for text sizes.

content.title: Width Variables
content.tooltip: Variables for width utilities (retains content-width).

content.title: Reset Styles
content.tooltip: Load ACSS' reset stylesheet.

content.title: Default Body Styles
content.tooltip: Load the default body tag styles.

content.title: Default Heading Styles
content.tooltip: Load global heading defaults.

content.title: Default Text Styles
content.tooltip: Load global text defaults.

content.title: Default Link Styles
content.tooltip: Load global link defaults.

content.title: Default Section Styles
content.tooltip: Load default section padding.

content.title: Focus Styles
content.tooltip: Load button/link focus styles.

content.title: Smooth Scrolling (CSS)
content.tooltip: Activate CSS-based smooth scrolling to hashlinks (recommended over Javascript-based scrolling).

content.title: Reduce Motion
content.tooltip: Turn off animations and transitions for users who prefer less motion (prefers-reduced-motion).

content.title: Overflow Detection
content.tooltip: Activate outlines to help identify elements that are overflowing and causing horizontal scrolling.

content.title: Generate Color Palette
content.tooltip: Do you want to add ACSS colors options in the Block Editor?

content.title: Replace Color Palette
content.tooltip: Do you want to replace all default color options with ACSS in the Block Editor?

content.title: Class-First Workflow
content.tooltip: Move the 'CSS Classes' input to the top of the Block Styles panel in the Block Editor.

content.text: Blog posts require some special handling in the Block Editor. Use these settings to tailor your blog authoring experience.

content.title: Blog Post Type(s)
content.tooltip: If you use a custom post type for blog posts, or want the editor to behave in default fashion for multiple post types, enter the comma-separated list of post type names here.

content.title: Blog Post BG Color
content.tooltip: You can optionally override the background color of blog posts.

content.title: Blog Post Text Color
content.tooltip: You can optionally override the foreground color of blog posts.

content.title: Default Styles
content.tooltip: Use @layer for default styles. Be aware that this can cause issues in Gutenberg.

content.title: Buttons & Links
content.tooltip: Use @layer for buttons and links.

content.title: Card Framework
content.tooltip: Use @layer for utility classes.

content.title: Icon Framework
content.tooltip: Use @layer for utility classes.

content.title: Utility Classes
content.tooltip: Use @layer for utility classes.

content.title: Inline ACSS Tokens
content.tooltip: Load ACSS tokens inline to improve performance and reduce render-blocking CSS.

content.title: Display Dashboard Icon
content.tooltip: Show the floating ACSS dashboard trigger on the frontend.

content.title: Admin Link Position
content.tooltip: Show the ACSS admin bar dashboard trigger.

content.title: Delete on Deactivation
content.tooltip: Type 'yes' to delete all settings and data when deactivating the plugin. This is irreversible.

content.text: Frames Not DetectedYou don't have Frames installed. Please install the Frames plugin. If you don't have Frames, you can purchase a license.
There are currently no experimental features.
